MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Eileen Burke, Atty. for defendant and moving party: James Chau, Judy Chau, William Chau
Robert Perkiss, Atty. for Plaintiff and Opposing party: M Snow

After hearing, The Court Adopted its Tentative Ruling as follows: Defendants James Chau, Judy Chau, William Chau's Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena And notice Of Deposition; Request For A Protective Order is granted. Sanctions are denied. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED. (EAH/612)

David Cook, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: M. Snow
Aileen Burke, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: James Hung Chau

AFTER HEARING, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff M. Snow's Motion To Compel Response To Discovery is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to Form Interrogatory Numbers 2.2, 2.3, 2.4, 2.5, 2.6, 2.7, 2.9, 2.10, 3.1, 3.2, 3.3, 3.4, 3.5, 3.6, 3.7, 4.1, 4.2, and 9.3.
The motion is denied as to Form Interrogatory Numbers 2.8. 2.11, 2.12, 2.13, 7.1, 7.2, 7.3, 8.1, 8.2, 8.3 8.4, 8.5, 8.6, 8.7, 8.8, 9.1, 12.1, 12.2, 12.3, 12.4, 12.5, 12.6, 12.7, 13.1, 13.2, 14.1, 14.2, 15.1, and 50.1-50.6 based upon the Fifth Amendment privilege. The motion is denied as to Form Interrogatory Nos. 11.1 and 11.2 as irrelevant.
The motion is denied as to Special Interrogatories 1-19, based upon the Fifth Amendment privilege.
The motion is granted as to Request For Production Numebr 4. The motion is denied as to Request For Production Number 7 as overly broad.
All requests for sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. Reporter: Kathryn Charoebtier, CSR #13319
